name: Real Car Highway Racing Game
description: Gear up for the ultimate racing adventure! Real Car Highway Racing Offline Game combines high-speed action, intense car racing, and real highway challenges in an immersive driving experience. Dodge traffic, drift with precision, and dominate in this thrilling car game. Race iconic cars like the Rover MX 12, Lamborghini Cardo, Chevrolet Camaro, and Bugatti Veyron through car traffic while tackling high-speed racing and exciting challenges in this free street racing simulator.
instructions: Mobile controls available and for keyboard W Arrow Up rarr Move Front S Arrow Down rarr Move Back A Arrow Left rarr Move Left D Arrow Right rarr Move Right
